name: @borjie/loop-quality-gates
description: Loop Quality Gates (Wave M3-M4) — the Layer 4 gate primitives plus a composite combinator. Five gates (groundedness, calibration, brand, authority, budget) plus an AND-composite that emits the full set of failed QualitySignals. See Docs/DESIGN/FIVE_LAYER_LOOP_ARCHITECTURE_SPEC.md.
